channel.title: SecIntel | Independent Zero-Day Intelligence Brief
channel.description: Recent content on SecIntel | Independent Zero-Day Intelligence Brief

item.title: Cyber Intel Brief: April 09, 2026
item.description:
Daily Cyber Intelligence Brief

Main Headline: Russian Military Intelligence Weaponizes 18,000 SOHO Routers for Mass Token Theft

The Big Story The Russian state-sponsored threat actor Forest Blizzard (APT28), linked to the GRU, has compromised over 18,000 small-office and home-office (SOHO) routers globally to facilitate large-scale authentication token harvesting. By exploiting known vulnerabilities in legacy and unpatched edge devices, the actors have successfully turned consumer-grade hardware into a distributed malicious infrastructure designed to intercept enterprise-level communications.

item.title: About the Intelligence Hub
item.description:
🛡️ Automated Threat Research

Welcome to a fully automated CTI (Cyber Threat Intelligence) pipeline.

This platform uses Python and Gemini 3.1 Preview to aggregate, summarize, and analyze global security feeds in real-time. It is fully automated

Research Focus:

  • Zero-day vulnerabilities
  • Ransomware trends
  • Nation-state actor tracking

Connect: [LinkedIn]
